title: About Nermin Tarhan
content:
About Nermin Tarhan

Nermin Aydin Tarhan

Born in Bursa in 1956. She completed her primary education in Muradiye and high school education in Bursa Girls Vocational High School. She graduated from Gazi University Vocational Education Faculty in 1978. She worked as an Art History Teacher in Ankara Yıldırım Beyazıt, Çubuklu and Etlik Girls Vocational High Schools. In 1978, she married Nevzat Tarhan. She quit her job saying that she would raise her children. She led an exemplary life dedicated to her husband and children. She acted with the principle of "The greatest work of a woman is well-bred and good children". He passed away in 2009 at the age of 53. May her soul rest in peace, may her grave be filled with light and may she be blessed with divine mercy.
